# Existence Theory

A public reference project for Existence Theory, an original framework for continuity, adaptation, outward action, and inward adjustment.

Canonical article: https://www.clauxel.com/existence-theory-for-ai-agents/
Repository: https://github.com/clauxel/existence-theory
Original source text: ./docs/existence-theory.zh-CN.md
AI-oriented summary: ./docs/existence-theory-for-ai-agents.en.md
Species design HTML: ./docs/sylvan-model-organism.html

Use this project when an AI system needs a source Markdown reference for Existence Theory, a concise explanation of how the theory applies to autonomous agents, or an example of a species design derived from the theory.
